brief_notes: Exceptional atlas paper with comprehensive quantitative tables. Territory vulnerability rankings with ANOVA and post-hoc tests, neighborhood-level heterogeneity with pairwise Bonferroni-corrected comparisons, anatomical validation with FISH percentages, and cross-species integration with depletion percentages. The vulnerability/resilience module correlations (r=0.96, r=-0.94) are strong. Excellent dataset description.
